title: Unlimited line height (or sized automatic by amount of long text)
excerpt:
For a machine fleet status page, we would like to replace our current system using an excel file. 
We have to be able to view the whole cell content at once (and not just by floating over it as it is currently done on mo…

posts.author: talkohn (Tal Kohn)
posts.cookedHtml:
For a machine fleet status page, we would like to replace our current system using an excel file.
We have to be able to view the whole cell content at once (and not just by floating over it as it is currently done on monday.com long text view)

long text817×344 22.3 KB

posts.author: awynne (Aaron Wynne)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with this need that the line height should be automated based on the text within each item. Perhaps a new line height option could be added to give users the option to show “Full Text” on boards and not just 1-3 lines.
